title: dryopteris auriculata
intro: Dryopteris auriculata, also known as the auricled wood fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its fronds with auricled pinnae. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Dryopteris auriculata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and possess antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparation of this plant is commonly used in traditional medicine, and it can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions.
